data.title: Cal Poly appoints Carter Henderson as new Director of Athletics, starting Oct. 13. Henderson brings vast experience from Stanford and other programs.
data.description: Cal Poly has announced the appointment of Carter Henderson as its new athletics director starting on October 13. Henderson, currently serving as the deputy athletics director at Stanford University, will bring a wealth of experience in intercollegiate athletics from various programs nationwide. The announcement was made in San Luis Obispo, California on September 25, 2025.

data.title: AlphaTON Corp closes $71M financing, acquires Initial TON Token.
data.description: AlphaTON Capital Corp has recently wrapped up a successful financing round, securing $71 million in funding. Additionally, the company has finalized the acquisition of an initial batch of TON tokens.

data.title: Saudi Arabia to be Guest of Honour at Forum Invest in Senegal 2025, on Oct 7-8 in Diamniadio, under the patronage of President Bassirou Diomaye Diakhar Faye. Hosted by APIX. 106 characters
data.description: The Forum Invest in Senegal 2025 (Fii Senegal) is set to take place on October 7–8 at the CICAD in Diamniadio. The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia will be the distinguished Guest of Honour at the event, which is being held under the patronage of President Bassirou Diomaye Diakhar Faye. Organized by the Senegalese Agency for Investment Promotion and Major Works (APIX), the Fii Senegal aims to connect opportunities and build the future. The event website, InvestInSenegal.sn, provides further information about this important gathering.

data.title: Global refrigerants market set to hit $36.7 billion by 2030, up from $27.2 billion in 2025, CAGR of 6.2%; industry shifts to eco-friendly options like HFOs, ammonia, CO₂, and propane amid regulatory push for sustainability.
data.description: A new report by BCC Research projects that the global refrigerants market will grow from $27.2 billion in 2025 to $36.7 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 6.2%. The report segments the market by refrigerant type, applications, and regions. It highlights the shift towards sustainable alternatives like hydrofluoroolefins and natural options due to environmental concerns. Factors driving the market's growth include urbanization, increased demand for AC and refrigeration systems, pharmaceutical industry needs, and automotive applications, especially with the rise of electric vehicles. The report emphasizes the importance of transitioning to eco-friendly cooling solutions.

data.title: House Committee starts probe into Uber for sexual abuse after report reveals higher frequency of assault cases than previously disclosed.
data.description: An investigation has been launched following a report by the New York Times revealing a higher number of sexual assault and misconduct cases than previously acknowledged by Uber. The inquiry comes amid growing concerns as the report highlighted that these incidents were occurring more frequently than initially reported by the company.

data.title: Nexstar & Sinclair boycott Jimmy Kimmel due to comments. They seek partnerships for their many local TV stations.
data.description: Nexstar and Sinclair are currently avoiding the late-night host due to his recent comments. Despite this, they are both in negotiations for agreements regarding their wide-ranging networks of local TV stations.
Israel: The Grunis Committee unanimously approved the appointment of David Zini as the head of the Shin Bet.

data.title: Valence secures $50M in Series B funding for AI coaching platform, Nadia, to support Fortune 500 expansion.
data.description: Valence, the company responsible for Nadia, the world's pioneering enterprise AI coach, revealed today that it has secured new funding led by Bessemer Venture Partners. This injection of funds is aimed at propelling the company's growth as more Fortune 500 companies embrace AI coaching programs. The announcement was made in New York on September 25, 2025. This funding round will enable Valence to further expand its operations and enhance its AI coaching services.

data.title: Encompass Health opens first location in Connecticut, now accepting patients at Danbury hospital.
data.description: Encompass Health, the leading owner and operator of inpatient rehabilitation hospitals in the United States, has recently opened its inaugural facility in the state. This marks a significant milestone for the company, as they expand their services to more regions. Situated in BIRMINGHAM, Ala., this new location is now ready to serve patients seeking high-quality rehabilitation care. This development was announced on Sept. 25, 2025. Encompass Health's determination to provide exceptional care is evident in this expansion, which will enable them to assist a larger number of individuals in their recovery journeys.

data.title: Golar LNG prices $500 million senior notes due 2030 with 7.500% annual interest rate in private offering.
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on September 25, 2025, Golar LNG Limited disclosed the pricing details of a private offering. The company, listed as GLNG on Nasdaq, revealed an Offering of $500 million in total principal amount of unsecured senior notes. These Notes are set to mature on October 2, 2030, with an annual interest rate of 7.500%. Issued at par, these senior unsecured obligations of the Company hold a due date in 2030.
